relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Leave beginnings and be carried toward maturity.
Foundations are honored but not endlessly relaid.
Maturity moves as Divine permits.
Enlightenment, heavenly gift, and Spirit partnership are holy realities.
The good word and coming-age powers have been tasted.
Total falling away is named as grave rupture.
Earth drinking rain and bearing useful plants shares blessing.
Thorns and thistles reveal what cannot remain.
Yet for the beloved, better things are expected.
The Divine does not forget love shown in serving the holy ones.
Hope asks for eagerness until completion.
Do not become sluggish; inherit promises through trust and patience.
The promise to Abraham rests on Divine self-oath.
Blessing and multiplication are spoken.
Patient endurance receives promise.
Human oaths confirm disputes.
Divine oath reveals unchangeable purpose.
Those who fled for refuge seize strong hope.
Hope becomes anchor of the soul, secure and entering within the veil.
Jesus enters as forerunner, high priest in Melchizedek’s order.

contemplative_note: Hebrews 6 is warning held by hope: love-service is remembered, promise is anchored, and the soul’s anchor enters within the veil.
